name: Password Reset
description: User cannot log in and requires a password reset.

checklist_items.item: Verify user identity via secondary authentication
Reset password and notify user via secure channel
Confirm user can log in successfully

name: System Outage
description: Critical system or service is unavailable affecting multiple users.

checklist_items.item: Notify stakeholders and management of outage
Identify root cause and document initial findings
Apply fix or initiate rollback procedure
Verify service restoration and monitor for 15 minutes

name: Access Request
description: Request to grant new system, application, or data access.

checklist_items.item: Obtain manager or data owner approval
Provision access in the relevant system
Notify requestor and confirm access is working

name: Hardware Failure
description: Physical device (laptop, printer, server component) has failed or malfunctioned.

checklist_items.item: Arrange replacement or loaner equipment if needed
Recover or backup user data where possible
Confirm user can continue work on replacement device

name: Software Bug
description: Application is behaving unexpectedly or producing errors.

checklist_items.item: Reproduce the issue and capture error details / screenshots
Identify and document workaround for affected users
Log bug report with development team or vendor reference number
